hero.title: Building Connected, Resilient Neighbourhoods
hero.subtitle: Join a network of communities and organizations transforming neighbourhoods through collaboration and shared resources.

features.title: How NOTF Works
features.subtitle: Explore our network through three powerful directories, powered by our innovative ask/offer matching algorithm that connects community needs with available resources

community.title: Community Directory
community.description: Browse {{count}} active neighbourhoods. Learn about their work and discover collaboration opportunities.

providers.title: Providers Directory
providers.description: Connect with {{count}} organizations supporting community work. CBOs, solution providers, and more.

map.title: Interactive Map
map.description: Visualize all {{count}} communities across Bengaluru. Discover neighbours and find local initiatives.

join.title: Join the Movement
join.subtitle: Three simple steps to start transforming your neighbourhood

step1.title: 1. Register
step1.description: Submit your community or organization details through our simple form. We'll review within 3-5 days.

step2.title: 2. Connect
step2.description: Get matched with communities and organizations that align with your needs and offers.

step3.title: 3. Collaborate
step3.description: Build partnerships, share resources, and create lasting impact in your neighbourhood.

cta.title: Ready to Transform Your Neighbourhood?
cta.subtitle: Join {{orgCount}}+ organizations and {{commCount}} communities building a better future together.

chatbot.title: NOTF Assistant
chatbot.welcome: Welcome! How can I help you today?
chatbot.tips: Tips: You can switch modes anytime using the repeat button in the header. Resize this window by dragging the top-left corner.

communities.title: Active Communities
communities.lead: NOTF supports neighborhood-level initiatives across India, working on community-driven transformation.

cta.title: Start in Your Neighborhood
cta.subtitle: Bring NOTF to your community and join a network of neighbourhoods transforming their futures together
cta.note: Use the button above to join NOTF, update your community's details, or share your success stories

providers.title: Solution Providers
providers.lead: Organizations providing expertise, services, and solutions to support community-driven transformation.

cta.title: Join as a Solution Provider
cta.subtitle: Support community initiatives with your expertise, services, and solutions
cta.note: Use the button above to become a solution provider, update your organization's profile, or explore partnership opportunities

map.title: NOTF Network Map
map.lead: Explore communities across India with ward boundaries

hero.title: Join NOTF
hero.subtitle: Connect your community or solution with the Neighbourhood of the Future network

messages.success: Thank you! Your application has been submitted successfully. We'll review it within 3-5 days.
messages.error: An error occurred while submitting your application. Please try again.
